title: Lead Web3 & Full-Stack Developer
description: Architected and built Fehuvia, an Open Finance Web3 B2B treasury workstation on Morph Layer 2 featuring an automated background gas faucet, a PostgreSQL listener daemon, and an AI co-pilot.
achievements: Designed Solidity billing clearance protocol deployed to Morph L2, achieving T+0 settlements under 2 seconds.
Engineered an automated self-healing background gas faucet to eliminate onboarding friction.
Integrated context-aware RAG pipeline utilizing OpenAI GPT-4o for cashflow forecasting and invoice OCR parsing.

title: Lead Hardware & Software Engineer
description: Developed AeroVit, a fitness-gamified smartwatch prototype consisting of custom ESP32-S3 hardware, real-time ML pose estimation, and Web3 reward minting pipelines.
achievements: Designed and brought up custom smartwatch PCBs using ESP32-S3, IMU (QMI8658), and heart rate sensors (MAX30102).
Built a 33-landmark MediaPipe BlazePose pipeline with real-time rep and form-tracking state machines.
Deployed AERO ERC-20 token on Ethereum Sepolia for gamified off-chain to on-chain fitness rewards.

title: B.S. in Computer Engineering
description: Expected graduation with specialization in Embedded Systems, Systems Design, and Digital Signal Processing.
achievements: Hands-on research and prototyping in microcontrollers, RTOS, PCB layout, and high-performance computing.
Designed muscle bio-signal acquisition controller using surface electrodes and ESP32 analog-to-digital filtering.

title: Freelance Web3 & Full-Stack Developer
description: Delivered custom high-performance Web2/Web3 dashboard interfaces and database systems, integrated custodial/non-custodial cryptocurrency payment rails, and optimized API payloads.
achievements: Developed secure client-side signing modules using MetaMask and EIP-1193 provider injection standard.
Designed PostgreSQL database schemas using highly optimized EXISTS and subquery aggregations, reducing query times.
Built and deployed RESTful microservices using Node.js/Express with strict rate-limiting and audit logging.
